jd_text: Role :Infrastructure & Networks Operations Sr. Manager Location : Onsite Dubai Key Responsibilities : Operational Leadership & Service Ownership Own day-to-day RUN operations for Infrastructure & Networks services across stores, warehouses, offices and hybrid cloud environments. Ensure service delivery meets business expectations for availability, performance, stability and user experience, especially for retail-critical services. Establish a culture of operational excellence: clear ownership, strong incident discipline, and continuous improvement. Act as senior escalation point for complex incidents, high-severity problems, and operational risks. Team & Managed Service Leadership Lead and govern Infrastructure & Networks operations delivered by our 3rd party (20+ resources). Drive service outcomes through clear operational governance, KPIs, action plans, and proactive risk management. Challenge technical decisions, validate RCA quality, and ensure the right fixes are implemented (not workarounds). Lead a dedicated MSP operations team (~20-30 resources including managers) as an integrated ‘one team’ organisation; sets objectives, assigns accountabilities, drives performance and capability. Builds and leads an in-house Infrastructure & Network Operations organisation; hires team leads and engineers; expected total org size 20–30 including leaders. Defines target operating model, role profiles, hiring plan, onboarding, and career paths for Ops teams as services are insourced. Incident, Major Incident & Problem Management Lead operational lifecycle of Incident / Major Incident / Problem Management, ensuring fast recovery and high RCA quality. Reduce recurring incidents by enforcing permanent fixes, standardisation, automation and better monitoring. Own after-action reviews and ensure actions are delivered end-to-end. Change, Release & ITSM Excellence (FreshService) Ensure robust Change Management and governance aligned to ITSM processes (FreshService). Improve change success rate by strengthening planning, testing, peer review and operational readiness. Ensure strong documentation, runbooks, and knowledge base practices. Microsoft Infrastructure Operations (Must-have technical depth) Own operational excellence for Microsoft core services, including: Active Directory (authentication, replication, DNS/DHCP, GPO) Windows Server operations and troubleshooting Provide technical leadership during critical incidents and complex troubleshooting. Ensure operational standards for patching, lifecycle, access control and resilience. Network Operations (Cisco) Oversee operational reliability of Chalhoub’s multi-country network estate: WAN/LAN/Wi-Fi connectivity across stores, warehouses and offices Cisco networking and security services Ensure strong monitoring, incident response, and operational controls for network stability. Storage, Backup & Recovery (Commvault preferred) Ensure reliable operations of enterprise storage platforms (capacity, performance, resiliency, lifecycle). Own backup and recovery operations aligned to business needs (RPO/RTO). Drive backup maturity: restore testing, reporting, compliance and continuous improvement. Strong knowledge of enterprise backup tooling; Commvault experience is a strong advantage. Automation, Observability & Modern Operations Drive transformation toward software-driven operations: Git-based ways of working (GitLab) Infrastructure-as-Code automation (Terraform) Observability and proactive monitoring (Datadog) ITSM integration and workflow automation (FreshService) Reduce manual work and operational risk through automation-first improvements. After-Hours Escalation & On-Call Participate in (or lead) an on-call / after-hours escalation model to ensure business continuity. Ensure effective operational coverage, escalation paths, and clear ownership for out-of-hours incidents. Must Have: 10+ years experience in Infrastructure and/or Networks operations in large enterprise environments (retail / multi-site strongly preferred). Proven experience leading RUN operations with managed services delivery models. Strong technical expertise in Microsoft technologies, including: Active Directory (must-have, deep troubleshooting capability) Windows Server (must-have) Solid experience in Cisco networking and enterprise networking fundamentals (target: CCNA–CCNP level knowledge; certification is a plus). Strong experience with Storage technologies and enterprise operations. Strong experience with Backup operations and restore processes (Commvault preferred). Strong incident leadership skills: major incidents, RCA, problem management and permanent fix delivery. Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills, including ability to operate under pressure. Nice to Have: Cisco certification (CCNA / CCNP) or equivalent. Experience with Azure and AWS operations in hybrid environments. Experience with GitLab, Terraform, Datadog, FreshService (or similar tools). Experience driving Infrastructure-as-Code / Network-as-Code operating models. ITIL foundations (pragmatic, outcome-driven application).
